spec.name: Chemical Move Cylinder
spec.summary: Repositions chemical thermal flux as a column volume at self reach, targeting one object with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions.
spec.effect_description: Repositions chemical thermal flux as a column volume at self reach, targeting one object with immediate discharge by changing existing conditions. A square move/affect recipe that channels chemical discipline into thermal output. It applies a cylinder pattern against object across self reach with immediate persistence.
